summary: Comprehensive testing completed for ORSO RS admin Site Images feature. All functionality working correctly - admin can login, navigate between tabs, view/modify/save site images, and changes are reflected dynamically on homepage.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing site_settings collection in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site Images feature fully tested and working. Admin can modify 6 image URLs (hero_home, category_vue_mer, category_plage_a_pieds, category_pieds_dans_eau, concept_interior, cta_background) from admin panel 'Images du site' tab. Changes persist to MongoDB site_settings collection and are loaded dynamically on homepage via getSiteImages() API call.

tab_navigation.details: Navigation between 'Propriétés' and 'Images du site' tabs works

site_images_display.details: All 6 configurable images displayed with preview and URL input

image_url_modification.details: Can modify image URLs in input fields

save_functionality.details: Save button successfully persists changes to backend

homepage_dynamic_images.details: Homepage loads images dynamically from API via getSiteImages()
